Animated risk. Phase 02.

Your risk.
Live. Leg
by leg.

Hover each leg to see how it's affecting total slip risk. The gauge animates in real time as risk shifts — not a static number, a live read.

Live run. Phase 02.

Watch a slip
get checked.

Every slip runs a live agent pipeline. Parse. Research. Correlate. Verdict. Hit run to see it happen.

Agent run ↑ Featured Game
trace_id: —
No events yet.
Idle. Hit run to start.
Three phases
One system.
Phase 01
💡

Build It

Don't stare at a blank slip. AI-researched prop ideas from matchup data, injury reports, and trends. No picks. Just context.

  • AI-curated prop highlights
  • Injury and matchup awareness
  • Add legs directly to your slip
Browse prop ideas →
Phase 02
⚠️

Check It

Stress test your slip before you submit. We flag your weakest leg, catch legs that overlap, and give you a quick verdict.

  • Weakest leg detection
  • Legs that overlap flagged
  • How swingy it is. Quick verdict.
Stress test a slip →
Phase 03
📉

Learn It

After results come in, run a postmortem. See what happened leg by leg. Find out what you keep losing on and why.

  • Leg-by-leg postmortem
  • What you keep losing on
  • Full bet history breakdown
See what killed it →
Phase 02. Verdict output.

What's the
trap in
your slip?

Paste your legs or build a slip. We'll tell you what looks off before you lose on the leg you should've cut.

Stress test now →
Demo mode available. No account required.
Slip analysis. 4-leg parlay. Moderate risk
Jalen Brunson — 27+ PTS
Strong at home. Last 5 avg 29.2 pts.
-115
Knicks ML
Overlaps with Brunson PTS. Correlated legs.
-130
Tyrese Haliburton — 8+ AST
⚠ Questionable. Practice limited today.
+105
PJ Tucker — 3+ REB
⛔ Weakest leg. Inconsistent. Low ceiling.
-140
Cut leg 4. Drops from +480 but improves hit rate significantly.
62%

No picks.
No locks.
No hype.

What we're not
  • ✕ A pick service
  • ✕ An influencer tout
  • ✕ A "LOCK" account
  • ✕ A sportsbook
  • ✕ Going to tell you what to bet
What we are
  • → A betting OS
  • → Research and risk analysis
  • → The smart friend in the group chat
  • → Built for bettors who think
  • → You decide. We just check.
Common questions

Let's clear it up.

"Is this just another pick site?"
No picks. No locks. No influencers.
Just analysis. You bring the slip. We show you what's risky.
"Is this complicated to use?"
Paste. See verdict.
Browse. Add leg.
That's it.
"Does it work with my sportsbook?"
Yes. FanDuel, PrizePicks, Kalshi, and more. Paste your legs or upload a screenshot.
"Will it tell me what to bet?"
No. It shows risk and context.
You decide. We make sure you're not walking in blind.
"Do I need an account?"
No account for demo mode.
Sign in to save history and postmortems.

Run your slip
through
ResearchBets.

Takes 30 seconds. Could save you a leg.

Stress test a slip → Browse prop ideas
ResearchBets
Built for bettors who think. Not affiliated with any sportsbook.
